scripts.copy-config: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const root = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('wrangler.jsonc', 'utf8')); const dist = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/server/wrangler.json', 'utf8')); dist.worker_loaders = root.worker_loaders; fs.writeFileSync('dist/server/wrangler.json', JSON.stringify(dist, null, 2));"
